title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
author: Hayden Field
raw_description: Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here. On Friday, the company unveiled the limited preview of its new GPT 5.6 model suite: Sol, the flagship; Terra, a medium-tier model for "high-volume work"; and Luna, a […]
summary: OpenAI在特朗普政府要求下发布GPT-5.6模型套件，包括旗舰版Sol、中端版Terra和轻量版Luna，标志着AI监管与模型发布的新动态。
analysis_note: 核心亮点是模型发布与政府监管互动，但技术细节有限，评分中等偏上。
